extraction.one_line_summary: CONRAD Patrick soloed to victory from a 14-rider break after attacking alone on Col de Portet, holding 1+ minute to the finish despite late chasing.
tactical_patterns: CONRAD attacked final serious climb (Col de Portet) from 14-rider break that never organized properly despite strong sprinters.
JUMBO-VISMA inexplicably put pressure late-stage before mountain-top finish with all GC riders present, wasting energy before critical stages.
Break chasers GORDU/COLBRELLI lost minute despite numbers because fractured groups couldn't coordinate against solo attacker on technical descent.

rider_signals.CONRAD Patrick: positive: Austrian champion showed willingness to attack alone from functioning break, suggesting confidence on technical descents with tragic history
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: JUMBO's late pressure with all GC riders present suggests either bluffing or questionable pacing strategy before consecutive mountain finishes
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: Third place from break with COLBRELLI suggests sprint legs not sharp enough to organize chase despite numerical advantage
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: Riding safely in gruppetto, conserving for final week sprint opportunities while MATTHEWS/COLBRELLI chase green jersey points
